title: Ragnarok
overview: At the Council of Valhalla, the gods vote unanimously for humankind's extinction. But Brunhilde, eldest of the Valkyrie sisters, raises her objection.

title: Worthy Opponent
overview: In the first round of the Ragnarok battle, Han dynasty warlord Lü Bu puts up a good fight against Norse god Thor, surprising the gods in attendance.

title: Killer Move
overview: To give Lü Bu the upper hand against Thor, Brünnhilde summons her sister Randgriz and asks her to transform into a sacred weapon — the Shield Breaker.

title: Joy
overview: Lü Bu's legs are crushed by the mighty Geirröd Thor's Hammer attack, but just when all hope seems lost, the warlord's trusty horse Red Hare rides in.

title: FILE No.00000000001
overview: Chosen for the next round is the father of humankind and the man bearing more hatred towards the gods than anyone else: Adam himself.

title: Great Emulation
overview: Zeus insists on going up against Adam, who joins forces with Valkyrie Reginleif to obtain a most peculiar weapon: a knuckleduster.

title: Expelled from Paradise
overview: Just when it looks like Adam will earn humankind the victory they long for, Zeus gathers his strength to ask Adam why he's really fighting.

title: Grace Abounding
overview: Zeus has transformed into his final most powerful form, but after the beating he's suffered, he may not last much longer in the fight.

title: Tyrant of the Ocean
overview: Humankind is desperate to win the next bout, but the god they're going up against is one of the mightiest of them all: Poseidon.

title: Greatest Loser
overview: Kojiro Sasaki uses his mighty Tsubame Gaeshi move to finish off Poseidon, but the god of the sea won't be sunk so easily.

title: The Swallow Gazes into the Abyss
overview: Through the power of Valkyrie Hrist, Kojiro's broken blade is transformed into dual swords, allowing him to tap into the depths of his inner strength.

title: And Ragnarok Goes On
overview: Despite Kojiro's Niten Ganryu duel blade method, Poseidon's powerful attacks continue to wear him down. But the battle isn't over yet.

title: Good vs. Evil
overview: The gods have no intention of letting the humans win the next round; for their next fighter, they present none other than the great hero, Hercules.

title: The Indomitable War God
overview: The spectators notice that the tattoos on Hercules have grown significantly — and if they continue to grow, the hero will suffer a painful death.

title: Birth of a Monster
overview: In late 19th century London, the young son of a prostitute has a special ability that helps him survive the poverty he was born into.

title: The Final Labor
overview: Although he’s lost his left arm, Hercules remains steadfast, easily summoning the strength to unleash his ultimate move: the Twelfth Labor.

title: Requiem
overview: The brutal fourth round has pushed both fighters beyond their breaking point; when the winner is finally announced, there is no joy or celebration.

title: Conflicting Motives
overview: To capitalize on humanity's momentum, Brünnhilde pays a visit to the colossal Tameemon Raiden, the most powerful sumo wrestler in history.

title: Hundred Seals
overview: Stepping into the sumo ring to take on Tameemon Raiden is the God of Destruction, the Destroyer himself: Supreme Lord Shiva.

title: The Pinnacle of 1116
overview: Years ago, Shiva spent many happy days with his best friend Rudra. Then one day, Rudra asks Shiva to join him on a journey to the top.

title: Resonance
overview: As a child, Raiden had to suppress his full strength so he wouldn’t hurt other people. But now, to win this battle, he’s not holding anything back.

title: The Brink
overview: The match comes to a moving end. Even Zeus is impressed by humanity's powerful spirit; but he's going to make sure the gods get the ultimate victory.

title: Round Six
overview: With the scoreboard almost neck-and-neck, Buddha declares that he'll fight in the next round — but whose side will he be fighting on?

title: Zero
overview: Struck by the amount of suffering humans must endure, Zerofuku decides to absorb all of their unhappiness, but it still isn't enough to end their pain.

title: The strongest puberty in history
overview: There was once a prince who was born into great wealth and given the very best of everything. But one day, he decides to leave it all behind.

title: Legend of the Underworld
overview: Nobody knows who the strange new creature is, but he's clearly very strong. And most worryingly, Buddha can't foresee his new opponent's next moves.

title: The Way of Light
overview: It looks like the match is over. But then Buddha gets up, looking stronger than ever. Will he be able to gain another crucial point for the humans?

title: Prologue: Recollections
overview: While humanity celebrates, the sixth round's result rattles the gods. Brunhilde and Hermes reflect on the previous battles and humanity's resilience.

title: King vs. King
overview: With the gods desperate for a win, Hades steps up to avenge his brother. Humanity sends Qin Shi Huang, setting the stage for a monumental clash of kings.

title: Chi You
overview: After uniting China, Qin Shi Huang ascends Mount Tai alone to prove himself before the demon god Chi You. There, he masters the ultimate martial art.

title: A Promise and an Oath
overview: As a child, Qin Shi Huang's daily life is filled with hostility. Yet over time, he finds happiness in the close bond he forms with his strict caretaker.

title: Pride of the King of Helheim
overview: As the seventh round heats up, Hades gouges his own chest, humming as blood pours out and empowers his divine weapon with new strength.

title: Return of the King
overview: On the brink of death, Qin Shi Huang draws strength from Alvitr, unleashing the Force of the Phoenix again. Hades readies his spear for the final blow.

title: Satan
overview: For the eighth round, the gods choose Beelzebub, the god cursed by Satan. Though shunned by all, he once had three close friends who shaped his destiny.

title: Light vs. Shadow
overview: While struggling with Beelzebub's vibration-based powers, Tesla recognizes them as a form of science and counters with the full force of human ingenuity.

title: A Curse and a Prayer
overview: Tesla traps Beelzebub in the Gematria Zone and unleashes the Tesla Step, but Beelzebub learns to nullify the onslaught. The gods expect victory, but...

title: The Torch Passed On
overview: Even after Beelzebub unleashes Helheim's forbidden technique, Tesla stands firm. As the battle peaks, he recalls childhood memories of his brother.

title: Progress
overview: Though battered, Tesla is relentless, pushing Beelzebub on the defensive and to his limits. The showdown between science versus myth reaches its climax.

title: The Sun God and the Rebellious Hero
overview: The gods' next fighter is Apollo, the radiant sun god. Representing humanity is King Leonidas of Sparta. As round nine begins, neither will back down.

title: Pride vs. Pride
overview: In the past, King Leonidas of Sparta defies Apollo's prophecies and goes to war. Now, with his pride on the line, he delivers a decisive strike at Apollo.

title: Know Thyself
overview: Fueled by unyielding resolve, Leonidas slams Apollo down. As the bloodied god rises, most gods scorn his pride, but Zeus and Ares see the truth.

title: A Clash of Souls
overview: Both fighters near death but stand tall, honoring each other's valor. Leonidas transforms his shield and advances as Apollo draws his mythical bow.
